chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 773 of 2025 Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 504 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 12.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for applicant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-773 of 225. M/s Safdar Ali Bhatti, Saeed Ahmed Bhatt and Liaquat Ali Shar, Advocates for applicants in Cr. Misc. App. No. S-504 of 2025 and for complainant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-773 of 2025. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant Bakhtullah Shar is present on interim pre-arrest bail in Cr. Bail App. No. S-773 of 2025. Learned Counsels for the parties are in attendance. They required that in Cr. Bail App. No. S-773 of 2025, pre- arrest bail be confirmed, whereas the Cr. Misc. App. No. S-504 of 2025, as referred in the earlier order, may be entertained to the extent of setting aside the impugned order therein, whereby application under Section 22-A & 22-B, Cr.P.C. was allowed. Learned Additional P.G. though extends his no objection to the allowing of the bail application on account of the sections being compoundable, states that the affidavits of the respondents and the applicants in Cr. Misc. App. No. S-504 of 2025 be obtained in order to ensure that no further disturbance could be made out. However, as the parties are present, it is not found required, and even otherwise, when the Cr. Misc. App. No. S-504 of 2025 was entertained, it was observed that in respect of the same incident, two different FIRs have been lodged and accordingly notices were issued. In the said circumstances, Cr. Misc. App. No. S-504 of 2025 is entertained.

No. S-504 of 2025 is entertained. Order dated 16.08.2025, as passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur under Section 22-A & 22-B, Cr.P.C. is set aside, whereas in Cr. Bail App. No. S-773 of 2025, the order dated 28.08.2025 stands confirmed. Both these matters stand disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E Abdul Basit
